task_description: Fix accentcard and cleancard Quran display modes to auto-fit text like fullcard mode, keeping typewriter animation. Card size should follow the longest surah so text never gets cut off.

verification.summary: Added lockQuranCardHeight() helper that pre-measures, auto-fits, locks min-height on .q-card + individual elements, and reserves space. Applied to ALL render functions (renderCard, renderFullCard, renderSlide, renderTypewriter, renderFade, renderFlip, renderGlow, renderMinimalCard, renderScroll, renderAccentCard/renderCleanCard). Card is now static at its largest size across all modes. renderMarquee unchanged (different paradigm).
